text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since Valentine's Day is coming up, Eishin Flash
and I visit a chocolate shop to see what's popular
this year.

text_block_list.name: Customers
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! I was in line first! Hey, quit shoving!

text_block_list.name: Employees
text_block_list.text: Would all customers interested in purchasing chocolates please line up here—in an orderly manner, please!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: What chaos...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't look like we'll be able to browse at our
leisure. What a shame...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I've already purchased what I wanted online, so
let's go back.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have witnessed that same scene many times
since my arrival in Japan, but I still find it curious.
choice_data_list: Why so? Are things different in Germany?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
We celebrate Valentine's Day as well, but flowers
are the primary gift of choice.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Also, only partners give and receive gifts... The
custom of giving "obligatory chocolates" does not
exist.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My father would gift roses to my mother every
year without fail.
choice_data_list:
So the idea of giving a gift to someone special
is the same.

So the idea of giving a gift to someone special
is the same.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's a little different, I think. In Germany, the gift
is not given as a love confession.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, why do people confess their
love to another on Valentine's Day in the first
place?
choice_data_list: Maybe because the day itself makes it easier.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain how it's easier to prepare yourself when
you've chosen a date to confess, especially on
Valentine's Day—the day of love.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, so it essentially creates a pretext... I think I
have a general grasp on the idea now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, a confession of love would irreversibly
change the established status quo between two
people.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
As such, it would be more considerate to express
your appreciation to someone regularly instead
of making a spontaneous show of affection.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...I do not have any examples as of now. May I
please have a little time to think upon it?
choice_data_list: Oh, you don't have to think about it that hard...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, but I wish to think it through myself. ...At any
rate, let's return home for now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Valentine's Day arrives.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Please accept this. It's a chocolate cake.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Why was that phrased as a question? This is a
perfectly standard Valentine's Day gift.
choice_data_list:
But you said giving obligatory gifts isn't
customary for you...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have put a great deal of thought into the matter
since then and realized gift giving is an easy
method to express one's feelings.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Ergo, I decided to partake in the custom.
However, this is meant to convey my gratitude for
you and not a confession by any means.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I've come to realize why people give each other
chocolate on Valentine's Day, however.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Because they want to see how surprised their
recipient will be as well as how troubled they
become over the gift's intention.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I jest, of course. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. My homeroom teacher wishes to speak
with you. Are you available right now?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Then I shall wait here and review my training
schedule while you two speak.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her homeroom teacher makes small talk with me
about how wonderful a student Flash is.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Good. All looks well.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ah, welcome back.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I will be going now. I'll see you again tomorrow at
nine o'clock to discuss my schedule.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Do you recall the discussion we had previously
about expressing your appreciation to someone
on a regular basis?
choice_data_list: Oh, the one we had on Valentine's Day?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In the end, I think it might be best to show your
feelings to them directly.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, simply being kind will not suffice. You
must impart them with something.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
For example, let's say you give a flower to
someone who doesn't normally keep them in their
house.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That flower will become part of their daily life
but, inevitably, will wilt and be thrown out at
some point.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
At that point, the person will become aware of a
new potential lifestyle—one with flowers.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And maybe, just maybe... they will think of the
person who gave them that flower, too.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...That is all. Please excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Eishin Flash leaves, I notice a sweet floral
scent in the air.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Its deep crimson petals look as smooth as velvet
as it sways in the breeze.
